name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, inaccurate payroll calculations cause compliance issues. We automate payroll data conversion instead of manual payroll processing using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate payroll calculations leading to compliance issues.
